subject: Golett, a rounded clay golem-like creature, standing on rocky ground
description: A chunky, rounded clay-colored creature with large circular eyes and a boxy body stands on rocky terrain. The creature has a distinctive spiral or geometric pattern on its torso that glows faintly in teal-green. Its body appears worn and ancient, like fired clay or ceramic, and it stands with a sturdy, grounded posture. Rocks and grey stone surround it, giving a dungeon-like or underground atmosphere.
foreground: boxy clay golem creature with glowing geometric marking
